title: Buttery Rice Vinegar Feast
description: A unique and adventurous Italian-inspired dish featuring seasoned rice vinegar that combines the best of savory flavors with a hint of spice, perfect for those looking to enjoy a paleo-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Red Pepper Flakes
ingredients.notes: For a spicy kick, adjust to taste.

ingredients.name: Vegetable or Air Fryer Frying Veggies (optional)
ingredients.notes: Such as bell peppers, onions, and mushrooms.

instructions: In a small bowl, mix rice vinegar, butter, garlic powder, red pepper flakes, paprika, Dijon mustard, and olive oil.
Stir until the mixture is well combined and the butter has melted.
If using vegetables for an added touch, toss them with a bit of olive oil and spread on a baking sheet. Air fry at 375°F (190°C) for about 5-7 minutes or until golden brown and tender.
Pour the rice vinegar mixture evenly over your seasoned veggies. Drizzle more olive oil if needed to add extra flavor.
Bake in preheated air fryer for about 8-10 minutes, or longer based on how crisp you like them.
Once done, garnish with fresh herbs and serve hot.
